use_cases: Displaying a rotating showcase of interface screenshots or product demos
Presenting portfolio items or design work in a slideshow format
Browsing through multiple visual assets with smooth transitions
Highlighting feature comparisons or before/after views
Creating interactive product tours with step-by-step interface views
ai_summary: A carousel component designed to showcase interfaces and visual content through a slideshow format. Features smooth scroll-based transitions for browsing multiple screens or images. Optimized for presenting SaaS products, portfolios, or visual galleries across both desktop and mobile platforms with a clean, minimalist aesthetic.
